flashcards.definition: Sum of all payments − principal = total interest; the true measure of borrowing cost.
Compare loans by APR (not just interest rate) because APR includes fees for a more complete picture.
If loan rate < potential investment return, extra money may be better invested than used for extra payments.
Loan amount ÷ property value; lower LTV = less risk = better terms from lenders.
Calculate how long it takes for savings from a financial decision (e.g., refinancing) to exceed the costs.
